meta.title: Terrarium Building in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Build your own terrarium in Calgary at a fun, hands-on workshop. Choose your plants, layer your soil, and take home a living piece of greenery. All supplies included.

content.subtitle: Build a little living world in a glass container and take it home.
content.intro: Terrarium building workshops in Calgary are a wonderfully satisfying way to spend an evening. You pick your plants, layer the soil and rocks, arrange moss and decorative elements, and end up with a self-contained miniature garden. It's creative, tactile, and the result actually lives on your desk or windowsill for months.

what_to_expect.heading: Choose your plants
what_to_expect.body: Workshops offer a selection of small plants, succulents, or tropicals. You pick what goes into your container.

what_to_expect.heading: Layer by layer assembly
what_to_expect.body: You'll learn the proper layering of gravel, activated charcoal, and soil so your terrarium drains and breathes properly.

what_to_expect.heading: Glass containers provided
what_to_expect.body: The vessel is included. Most workshops offer a range of shapes and sizes for you to choose from.

what_to_expect.heading: Care instructions included
what_to_expect.body: You'll leave knowing exactly how to water and light your terrarium so it stays healthy at home.

tips: Don't overwater. Terrariums need far less water than you think, especially closed ones.
Use long tweezers or a chopstick to position small plants in narrow containers. Your fingers often can't reach.
Calgary's dry indoor air in winter makes closed terrariums a great option. They self-regulate humidity.
A terrarium makes a great long-lasting gift. Many people make extras at workshops for friends.
Mixler lists terrarium building events in Calgary when they're added. Join the waitlist and we'll send you a heads up.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run terrarium building events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need to know anything about plants?
faq.a: No plant knowledge required. The instructor covers everything, including care instructions for after you take it home.

faq.q: What type of terrarium will I make?
faq.a: It depends on the workshop. Some focus on succulents, others on tropical plants. The listing will tell you which type.

faq.q: How do I keep it alive after the workshop?
faq.a: You'll get care instructions at the end of the session covering light, water, and maintenance. Most terrariums are low-maintenance.
Yes. The glass container is included in the workshop cost, along with all soil, plants, and decorative materials.
